name: Poor Man's Perogies
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the diced onions in 1 1/2 cups of margarine until tender.
2. Cool lasagne noodles as directed on the box.
3. Boil potatoes until tender as for mashed potatoes.
4. Cube the Velveeta cheese.
5. After potatoes are cooked, add cheese and remaining margarine (no milk).
6. In a 9 x 13 pan, layer:
- 1/3 of onions on bottom layer of noodles
- 1/3 of potatoes
- Repeat layers ending with mashed potatoes
7. Top with Parmesan cheese and pepper.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Cut into squares and serve.
